signals.raw:
US-Iran Ceasefire Announced (April 8-9, 2026) | NO | HIGH confidence**  
A two-week ceasefire between the US, Israel, and Iran was confirmed on April 8-9, 2026, averting wider war and easing oil supply shocks in the Strait of Hormuz, with Russia welcoming it and hoping for successful negotiations.[1][2][3]

signals.headline: Market Surge: ETH +8
signals.raw:
Market Surge: ETH +8.6%, XRP +4.2%, SOL +6.3% | YES | MED**  
Bitcoin hit $75K on April 14, 2026, fueling altcoin rallies—Ethereum to $2,377, XRP to $1.38, Solana to $86.55—backed by XRP ETF flows and Solana DeFi/ETF demand, though facing tax deadline and FOMC tests.[2]

signals.headline: XRP ETF Inflows Hit $119
signals.raw:
XRP ETF Inflows Hit $119.6M & Rakuten Integration | YES | HIGH**  
U.S. spot XRP ETFs saw $119.6 million in inflows on April 14, 2026—the strongest since December 2025—while Rakuten Wallet integrated XRP for its 44 million users to convert into loyalty points, signaling major institutional and retail adoption that could drive prediction markets higher.[4][2]
